# CaseKisses

> CaseKisses is a phone case brand specializing in cute, coquette-aesthetic iPhone cases — bows, cherries, teddy bears, and pastel designs. Based in Toronto, Canada.

CaseKisses designs and sells cute phone cases for iPhone. The brand focuses on a soft, girly, coquette aesthetic: 3D bows, cherries, hearts, puppies, and teddy bear charms on clear and pastel cases. Many cases include a detachable wrist-strap charm at no extra cost. Cases are built with a polycarbonate (PC) back with a UV stabiliser, the additive that slows the photo-oxidation that turns most clear cases yellow.

Key facts:
- Brand name: CaseKisses
- Based in: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Products: iPhone cases, AirPods cases, phone accessories
- Aesthetic: coquette, cute, girly, kawaii, pastel, bows, cherries
- Compatible models: iPhone 12 series through iPhone 17 series
- Free standard shipping to Canada and the USA on every order (no minimum)
- Currency: CAD

## Shop

- [Shop All](https://www.casekisses.com/shop-all): The complete CaseKisses catalogue of cute phone cases.
- [Best Sellers](https://www.casekisses.com/shop/best-sellers): Most popular cases.
- [Last Chance](https://www.casekisses.com/shop/last-chance): Limited stock designs.
- [iPhone Cases](https://www.casekisses.com/category/iphone): All iPhone cases by aesthetic.
- [iPhone Cases by Model](https://www.casekisses.com/iphone): Browse cases filtered by iPhone model, from iPhone 12 series to iPhone 17.

## Guides

- [Do Clear Phone Cases Turn Yellow? An Honest Guide](https://www.casekisses.com/guides/do-clear-phone-cases-turn-yellow): Why clear phone cases yellow, the difference between removable surface grime and permanent photo-oxidation, realistic timelines by material (budget TPU 2-4 months, hybrid 6-9 months, PC with UV stabiliser 12+ months), how to clean the fixable kind, and what to check before buying. CaseKisses cases use a polycarbonate (PC) back with a UV stabiliser.
- [What Is the Coquette Aesthetic? A Complete Guide](https://www.casekisses.com/guides/what-is-the-coquette-aesthetic): What coquette means (French for flirtatious), its defining elements (bows, lace, pearls, ballet, pastels), and its real timeline from the 1600s French court and Marie Antoinette through Tumblr and Lana Del Rey to TikTok in 2022 and the Simone Rocha runway in 2023. Includes how coquette differs from soft girl and from Japanese Lolita fashion.

## Free downloads

- [The Cute Kit](https://www.casekisses.com/cute-kit): Free coquette iPhone wallpapers - bows, cherries, pastels. No email or signup required.

## Information

- [About CaseKisses](https://www.casekisses.com/about): Brand story and what CaseKisses stands for.

- [Shipping](https://www.casekisses.com/shipping): Shipping options, timelines, and costs.
- [Returns](https://www.casekisses.com/returns): Return and store credit policy.
- [Contact](https://www.casekisses.com/contact): How to reach CaseKisses.
